description: Composition Blue jeans made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex with a washed and faded look and creasing, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing and distressed edging, brand patch appliquéd on the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure Fit Low rise, Regular fit Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Take edgy dressing to the next level in these distressed blue skinny jeans from puma. The low waisted jeans are perfect for casual outings with friends. Team this pair with grunge tees and leather vests with leather boots for a great rocker look. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 32"
